🚀MEET THE USYD ASTROS 2026 TEAM🚀

This year, the USYD Astros are ready to launch into the year stronger than ever. With lots of beautiful faces, big energy and even bigger vibes, we have no doubt they will leave a big impact on the legacy of VSA at USYD 💫

We cannot wait to see them in action this year and could not be more excited for the year ahead of us!

Here’s another look into the life of a PR Officer through our graphics director’s POV!🎨

Full of lasting memories and brainrotted friendships, Triana’s PR year was one hell of a ride. She got to experience many new things from choreographing a heck of a state camp dance🔥 to endless parties and munches with the team 😋

Reminder that applications close TODAY so sign up NOW to find new friends who you can call FAMILY 🏡

APPLICATION FOUND IN LINK IN BIO

Swipe through to take a lil peak in the life of a pr through our marketing directors POV!!✨

From late night açai runs at sweet beet 😋 to having the time of her life at state camp and retreat, Maryanne’s PR year was jam packed full of good times and good vibes 🤙

‼️APPLY FOR PR RIGHT NEOWW‼️ and fill up ur uni experience with so many fun memories 

⭐️Application form can be found in the link in bio (CLOSES FRIDAY)

Take a look into the life of our IVP, as he captures the highlights of his first year in VSA

From organising events for gms to interacting with IUC, Brendan has created many unforgettable memories and lifelong friends that he can now call FAMILY 👨‍🦲

Applications close on Friday at 11:59 - don’t miss out on this opportunity!!

DO U HAVE NO FRIENDS AT UNI?!? 🥲

SIKE😛 but do u genuinely want know what it’s like to make the best of your uni experience?🤩

Apply now to become a Public Relations Officer (PR), a subcommittee role where you’ll help share and celebrate Vietnamese culture through our food 🍔, social 👯‍♀️, and sports events 🏈. You’ll work closely with an amazing team, make lifelong friends (WE PROMISE), and get to attend VSA exclusive events like Canberra Youth Night, State Camp, and charity dinner (SO FUN)

Here’s a little sneak peak at what it’s like to be a public relations officer last year and meet your life long friends🥰 

Still unsure? Well remember you miss 100% shots u don’t take ⛹️‍♂️

⏰ Applications close Friday 28th Feb
💬 Got questions? DM us or ask at our banh mi event 

Apply now with the link in Bio
